allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; b=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(b['knowledge'][0]['title'] if b['knowledge'] else 'NO KNOWLEDGE'\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; b=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('method_used:', b['method_used']\); print\('product count:', len\(b['products']\)\); [print\(' -', p['payload']['sku'], p['payload']['name'], '$' + str\(p['payload']['price']\)\) for p in b['products']]")
